updates.title: Why you should file your ITR before by the deadline: Top 3 benefits for taxpayers
updates.summary: The ITR filing season for FY 2025-26 is ongoing, with forms notified. Filing late can cause stress, errors, and penalties. Here's why you must file your ITR within the due date.

updates.title: EPF e-nomination can be considered invalid if you miss this key step — Here's what to do
updates.summary: EPFO mandates e-nomination for EPF members to ensure smooth transfer of benefits to nominees upon a member's death and avoiding legal disputes. Members must complete e-signing via the EPFO portal to validate nominations. Here's how to do it.

updates.title: Sold a residential property? Here's how you can save tax on capital gains

updates.title: Earnings growth, end to West Asia war could drive double-digit gains for Nifty: Ashwini Shami, Omniscence Capital
updates.summary: Although FY27 margins may see some compression due to inflationary pressures, even moderate single-digit earnings growth, coupled with a market re-rating as the West Asia crisis eases, could result in double-digit returns for the Nifty from current levels, said Ashwini Shami of Omniscience Capital.
